catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for INSITU_GLO_BGC_DISCRETE_MY_013_046, detailing the reprocessed in-situ biogeochemical observations from MERCATOR OCEAN INTERNATIONAL. It covers product description, file format, nomenclature, and references.

product_line.name: Global Ocean Reprocessed in-situ Observations of biogeochemical Product
